description: Lock the direct-source chronology and causal corrections that complete source review for all pre-Future launch nodes.

checks.reason: Trace analysis dates the earliest reliable spearthrower evidence to about 31,000 calibrated years BP.
The conservative anchor uses definite 306/5 BCE evidence rather than the 399 BCE bow-machine.
The artillery node is narrowed to attested torsion catapults.
Columbia documents transferable merchant deposit-shop receipts around 900 CE.
Century precision covers directly documented 1372 civic clock enforcement.
Science Museum dates the surviving Wells clock and decorated face to 1392.
The complete insulin amino-acid sequence was established in 1955.
NASA identifies Salyut 1 as the first space station, launched in 1971.
The BIOS-3 review states that the facility was built in 1972.
IMF dates common use and acceleration of the named phase to the 1980s; the 1983 anchor preserves that decade while following the graph's Internet milestone.
The eDNA review dates the first sediment DNA extraction reference to 1987.
The first published business-data-warehouse architecture appeared in 1988.
The ERP category was coined by Gartner in 1990.
The directly documented robotic NIR sorting project began in 1993.
Amazon and eBay Web platforms both came online in 1995.
The review locates large-platform moderation expansion in the 2000s.
The review identifies the 2002-2003 SARS response as the field's current origin.
The literature review begins in 2004 with the first refrigerated-vehicle RFID proposal.
The Nebraska microwave link began large-scale interactive medical television testing in 1964.
Early planning software predates ERP.
The 1988 warehouse architecture predates ERP terminology.
Crystallography is complementary to chemical sequence determination.
Bioinformatics postdates the first complete protein sequence.
Generic construction is not a distinctive BIOS-3 causal dependency.
The BIOS-3 milestone is not defined by refrigeration.
Clinical medicine is not a distinctive BIOS-3 origin dependency.
Salyut 1 launched before BIOS-3 was built.
Human platform governance predates automated classification.
CRM predates the scoped Web-commerce platforms.
The NIR system did not generally require laser scanning.
eDNA extraction predates pathogen genomic epidemiology.
The 1964 television program did not require EHRs.
The 1964 television program predates smartphones.
Chartered civic authority is institutional lineage rather than clock machinery.
The 1993 project directly used pattern recognition and neural networks.
Two-way television defines the scoped video-consult milestone.
The 112-mile microwave link carried the interactive service.
